jobs.name: marketing-dead-loop-watchdog
jobs.description: Detects >=3 consecutive dead-loop actions (measurement_hold, distribution_architecture_repair) without a live external action. Escalates by patching the distribution lane to dead_loop_escalation.
jobs.schedule_hint: Every hour, run before the marketing-active-loop cron

jobs.name: marketing-distribution-hunter
jobs.description: Runs the distribution hunter so system-design repairs create fresh execution artifacts instead of stopping at monitoring.

jobs.name: marketing-outcome-capability-runner
jobs.description: Forces a non-Reddit, Codeberg-linked distribution capability when outcome-system repairs are still open, so the loop creates reusable execution assets instead of another prescription.
jobs.schedule_hint: Every 12 hours or immediately after a workflow audit with system-design repairs

jobs.name: marketing-outcome-execution-board-runner
jobs.description: Turns the marketing execution board into an active follow-through runtime so system-design repairs advance the best current Codeberg-linked lane instead of stopping at packet refreshes or queue housekeeping.
jobs.schedule_hint: Every 6 hours, offset from the distribution hunter, and immediately after a system-design repair refreshes the execution board

jobs.name: marketing-apollo-outbound-verifier
jobs.description: Re-checks whether Apollo is merely list-ready or actually send-verified.

jobs.name: marketing-apollo-sequence-launcher
jobs.description: Refreshes the Codeberg-primary Apollo launch packet only when a non-zero list is verified, keeping launch gates separate from live-send proof.
jobs.schedule_hint: After each successful Apollo list verification refresh

jobs.name: marketing-telegraph-crosspost-oneshot-20260529
jobs.description: One-shot: cross-post 2 remaining uncrossposted Ralph-Site blogs to Telegraph after 6h spidering cooldown clears (2026-05-29 04:00 → 10:00 UTC). Posts: ai-agent-tool-loop-debugging-guide, offline-ai-coding-local-llm-guide.
